content: Once ready, you can find the files in your browser's download folder and close this tab.

comment.text: This translation key is used to display a message informing users that files are ready to be downloaded and can be found in their browser's download folder. It appears on a UI element related to file downloads, likely as a confirmation or completion message. The translator should consider the tone of the English content, aiming for clarity and reassurance.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'tab' (browser tab) is translated as 'nişan' (which means 'mark', 'sign', or 'icon'), which is incorrect in the context of a web browser.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Hazır olduqda, faylları brauzerinizin endirmə qovluğunda tapa və bu tabı bağlaya bilərsiniz.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'tab' (browser tab) is translated as 'раздел' (section), which changes the technical meaning of the instruction.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: След като сте готови, можете да откриете файловете в папката за изтегляне на браузъра си и да затворите тази таб.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation contains several linguistic errors that make it sound unnatural and technically incorrect: 'fișeirele' is not a word (should be 'fișierele'), 'în dosarul de descărcări din browser-ul' is grammatically broken (should be 'în folderul de descărcări al browserului'), and 'puteți închide acestă filă' uses the wrong gender for the demonstrative adjective (should be 'această filă').
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Odată ce sunt gata, puteți găsi fișierele în folderul de descărcări al browserului și puteți închide această filă.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Serbian translation has a completely different meaning. The English text is about file downloads, while the Serbian text is about changing user permissions or upgrading a subscription plan.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Када буде спремно, фајлове можете пронаћи у мапе за преузимање вашег претраживача и затворити ову картицу.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Serbian translation is completely unrelated to the English source. The English text is about file downloads, while the Serbian text is about changing user permissions or upgrading a tariff plan.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Kada budu spremni, datoteke možete pronaći u fascikli za preuzimanje vašeg veb-pretraživača i zatvoriti ovu karticu.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation of 'tab' is incorrect. 'Skedë' means 'file', whereas the English text refers to a browser 'tab'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Pasi të jeni gati, mund t'i gjeni skedarët në dosjen e shkarkimit të shfletuesit tuaj dhe të mbyllni këtë tab.
